perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short dark hair, wearing a yellow, red, and white checkered sweater with smiley faces, stands before a mirror. She initially adjusts her hair with both hands, looking at her reflection. (2) She continues to refine her hairstyle, smoothing strands and checking her profile in the mirror. (3) She leans in closer to the mirror, touching her cheek and chin area while speaking briefly, finishing by looking directly toward the camera/mirror.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The soundscape begins with a quiet indoor ambient hum; no music is playing. (2) A soft female voice is heard speaking a single word briefly as she looks in the mirror. (3) The same female voice repeats the word in a calm tone before the audio fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) No decorative or functional text is displayed on the screen at any point during the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The creator performs a continuous mirror check of her hair and skin.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with a dark bob haircut, wearing a distinctive oversized checkerboard sweater featuring yellow, red, and white squares with black smiley faces.
